name: Egg Burrito
recipeIngredient: Mozzarella cheese, Cheddar cheese, and Monterey Jack cheese (shredded)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the flour tortilla on a hot grill.
2. Beat the eggs with buttermilk, salt, and pepper; scramble until set but not hard.
3. Spread the scrambled eggs onto the warmed tortilla.
4. Place a strip of crisply cooked bacon on top of the scrambled eggs.
5. Add refried beans and Chili Verde to the burrito.
6. Sprinkle the cheeses (Mozzarella, Cheddar, and Monterey Jack) generously over the ingredients.
7. Roll up the burrito tightly.
8. Heat in a microwave oven until the cheese is melted.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Cooking time: 2 minutes
